---
title: "Quarto & placing text to the right margin"
format: 
    pdf: 
        keep-tex: true
    html: default
engine: knitr
---


This is the same sentence's first part \hfill\ [this is the end of sentence.]{style="float:right"}



# Summary
Ten years experience solving problems

# \textcolor{blue}{Experience}

## First Job, Newark, NJ       \textcolor{red}{\hfill (5/2014-Present)}
### Programmer

* Solved analysis problems using data automation.

## Second Job, Newark, NJ      \hfill (01/01/04/2014) 
### Data Analyst

* Debugged Programs.

You can further adjust colors with:
# Summary
Ten years experience solving problems

# Experience

## First Job, Newark, NJ        \hfill (5/2014-Present) 
### Programmer

* Solved analysis problems using data automation.

## Second Job, Newark, NJ      \hfill (01/01/04/2014) 
### Data Analyst

* Debugged Programs.
